items.title: Autonomous AI at Scale: Adobe Agents Unlock Breakthrough Creative Intelligence With NVIDIA and WPP
items.description: AI agents are transforming how work gets done across all industries, accelerating everything from content creation to decision-making. NVIDIA’s expanded strategic collaborations with Adobe and WPP are bringing agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations across creative production and customer experience orchestration.  As demand for personalized customer experiences surges, brands require intelligent systems […]
items.content: AI agents are transforming how work gets done across all industries, accelerating everything from content creation to decision-making. NVIDIA’s expanded strategic collaborations with Adobe and WPP are bringing agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations across creative production and customer experience orchestration. As demand for personalized customer experiences surges, brands require intelligent systems that can plan, create, produce and activate content continuously — without compromising control, governance or brand integrity. Consider a global retailer delivering the right offer, image, copy and price, across millions of product, audience and channel combinations — updated in minutes instead of months. For marketing and creative teams, that means moving from one-size-fits-all campaigns to tailored experiences that are always on, always relevant and on brand. All of it is powered by intelligent systems that continuously generate and deliver content without sacrificing control, governance or brand integrity. The expanded collaborations bring together three complementary strengths: Adobe’s creative and customer experience platforms and the new Adobe CX Enterprise Coworker, WPP’s global media and marketing expertise, and NVIDIA’s accelerated computing and software stack, including NVIDIA Nemotron open models, NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and the NVIDIA OpenShell secure runtime for building and running secure agentic AI systems. As these agents begin orchestrating multistep workflows, tapping sensitive data and triggering actions across marketing stacks, enterprises need a way to enforce clear rules of engagement so every operation remains compliant, on brand and within defined risk boundaries. Powered by the NVIDIA OpenShell runtime, every agent operates within a secure, isolated environment, delivering enterprise-grade control, consistency and auditability across the entire marketing lifecycle, with verifiable policy management, answering the question, “What can the agent do?” and not just, “What policy is in place?” In governed environments, enterprises can also keep key workflows and intelligence services inside their trust boundary, including securely invoking Adobe CX Intelligence as part of customer experience agents. A live demo of CX Enterprise Coworker — powered by NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, including the OpenShell runtime and Nemotron models — will be featured during Adobe Summit’s day-two keynote taking place Tuesday, April 21, at 9 a.m. PT. The collaboration enables: End-to-end agentic workflows: Adobe is developing creative and marketing agents that can generate, adapt and version on-brand assets. Adobe’s CX Enterprise Coworker orchestrates downstream customer experience workflows from personalization to activation, closing the loop between content creation and customer engagement. Controlled execution with NVIDIA OpenShell: Agents run in a policy-based, containerized sandbox designed to keep execution governed, observable and auditable, helping enterprises safely deploy long-running agentic workflows on premises or in the cloud. Commercially safe content at scale: Adobe Firefly Foundry, accelerated by NVIDIA AI infrastructure, can help organizations deeply tune custom models on their proprietary assets, enabling agents to generate commercially safe content at scale and aligned to brand identity. A 3D digital twins solution for scalable marketing production: Adobe’s cloud-native 3D digital twin solution is now generally available, built on NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and OpenUSD. 3D digital twins serve as persistent product identities that agents use to automate and scale high-fidelity content creation across formats, markets and configurations. Creative Intelligence Meets Performance Intelligence With Policy-Governed Agents Governed environments such as the ones enabled by this collaboration act as a set of “guardrails” that keep AI operations observable and auditable, preventing the system from acting outside of a company’s specific data boundaries or brand rules. By combining Adobe’s creative platforms, WPP’s media and marketing expertise and NVIDIA’s secure infrastructure with CX Enterprise Coworker, brands no longer have to choose between speed and safety. Autonomous agents can now generate, adapt and activate content at scale while operating within governed, policy-driven environments. The result is a new foundation for agentic marketing — where creative intelligence, performance and trust are built in from the start and delivered at global scale. Watch NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang’s Adobe Summit fireside chat with Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen, taking place today at 2:20 p.m. PT.
items.author: Richard Kerris
items.titleZh: 大规模自主AI：Adobe助手携手NVIDIA与WPP开启突破性创意智能
items.descriptionZh:
随着人工智能代理技术逐渐渗透各行各业，从内容创作到决策制定的工作流程正在经历根本性变革。在这一趋势下，英伟达近期深化了与Adobe和WPP的战略合作，旨在将智能代理AI置于企业营销运营的核心，覆盖创意生产与客户体验编排的全过程。

当前，市场对个性化客户体验的需求激增，品牌方亟需能够持续规划、创作、制作并激活内容的智能系统，同时确保不牺牲管控力、治理标准或品牌一致性。例如，一家全球零售商需要在数百万种产品、受众和渠道组合中精准推送匹配的优惠、图像、文案和价格，并将更新周期从数月缩短至几分钟。对营销和创意团队而言，这意味着从“一刀切”的营销活动转向持续在线、高度相关且符合品牌调性的个性化体验。这一切都依赖于能够在保持控制力与品牌完整性的前提下，持续生成和交付内容的智能系统。

此次扩大的合作汇聚了三方的互补优势：Adobe的创意与客户体验平台及其新推出的CX Enterprise Coworker、WPP的全球媒体与营销专业知识，以及英伟达的加速计算与软件堆栈。英伟达的软件堆栈包括Nemotron开源模型、Agent Toolkit，以及用于构建和运行安全智能代理系统的OpenShell安全运行时环境。

随着这些代理开始编排多步骤工作流、调用敏感数据并在营销技术栈中触发操作，企业需要一种方法来执行明确的交互规则，以确保每项操作都合规、符合品牌规范且处于既定风险边界内。借助英伟达OpenShell运行时的支持，每个代理都在一个安全、隔离的环境中运行，为整个营销生命周期提供企业级的控制力、一致性和可审计性。它实现了可验证的策略管理，不仅回答“当前策略是什么”，更关键的是能明确界定“代理能做什么”。在受治理的环境中，企业还可将关键工作流和智能服务保留在其信任边界内，包括安全地调用Adobe CX Intelligence作为客户体验代理的一部分。

在4月21日太平洋时间上午9点举行的Adobe Summit第二天主题演讲中，将展示一个由英伟达Agent Toolkit（包含OpenShell运行时和Nemotron模型）驱动的CX Enterprise Coworker实时演示。此次合作主要实现了以下能力：

端到端的智能代理工作流：Adobe正在开发能够生成、调整和版本化品牌资产的创意与营销代理。其CX Enterprise Coworker可编排从个性化到激活的下游客户体验工作流，从而闭合内容创作与客户互动之间的循环。

基于NVIDIA OpenShell的受控执行：代理运行于一个基于策略的容器化沙箱环境中，旨在确保执行过程受治理、可观察且可审计，帮助企业安全地在本地或云端部署长期运行的智能代理工作流。

规模化生成商业安全内容：由英伟达AI基础设施加速的Adobe Firefly Foundry，可帮助组织基于其专有资产深度调优定制模型，使代理能够大规模生成符合商业安全要求且与品牌形象一致的内容。

面向规模化营销生产的3D数字孪生解决方案：Adobe基于英伟达Omniverse库和OpenUSD构建的云原生3D数字孪生解决方案现已全面上市。3D数字孪生作为持久的产品标识，可供代理用于跨格式、市场和配置自动化并规模化生成高保真内容。

**创意智能与性能智能在策略治理代理中的融合**

通过此次合作实现的受治理环境，如同一套“护栏”，能够保持AI操作的可观察性和可审计性，防止系统在企业的特定数据边界或品牌规则之外行动。通过将Adobe的创意平台、WPP的媒体营销专长、英伟达的安全基础设施与CX Enterprise Coworker相结合，品牌方不再需要在速度与安全之间做出取舍。自主代理如今可以在受治理、策略驱动的环境中规模化地生成、调整和激活内容。

这为智能代理营销奠定了新的基础——创意智能、性能与信任从一开始就被内置其中，并能在全球范围内交付。英伟达创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋与Adobe首席执行官Shantanu Narayen在Adobe Summit上的炉边谈话已于太平洋时间今日下午2:20举行，进一步深入探讨了此次合作的前景。

With a full list of components that include the Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus, ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM, a 2TB WD Black SN850X SSD, Corsair Frame 4500X RS-R case, and ASRock AIO Pro White 360 CPU cooler, all for just $1499.99, all you need to complete the build is a graphics card and power supply. Plus, all the visible components are white, so it's possible to make a clean white PC build in one swift go. ● Grab this deal at Newegg You are managing to save a whopping $1135.96 off the $2635.95 list price for these components, which is nothing to sniff at. The Newegg listing for the 64GB of Corsair memory is $1175.99, along with $559.99 for the excellent Gen 4 WD Black SN850X M.2 SSD, both heavily overpriced due to the price surging from the AI-data center crunch affecting the memory supply chain. Combo deals like this are a great way to pick up extra-expensive components like RAM and SSDs at a lower price, with this particular bundle making the RAM and SSD $602 in total. Save 43% ($1,135.96)Newegg Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus bundle: was $2,635.95 now $1,499.99 at NeweggThis Newegg bundle has almost everything you need to build an all-white PC, including Intel's latest Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor, ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM, a 2TB WD Black SN850X SSD, Corsair Frame 4500X RS-R case, and ASRock AIO Pro White 360 CPU cooler.View Deal The Core Ultra 7 270K Plus is at the heart of this bundle deal. It's just as fast as Intel's Core i9-14900K in gaming, and is comparable with AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X in productivity workloads, but at a fraction of the price. As you can see from our benchmark testing chart, the 270K Plus is pretty good in a gaming environment, but exceptional in single-threaded and multi-threaded performance against its competition. Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future) The most expensive component in our bundle is, of course, the RAM. It's priced well over a thousand dollars, insane inflation, but a common sight these days. This large 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM has a CAS latency of CL32 and timings of 40-40-84.The combo also includes ASRock's flagship Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, which has interestingly dropped all USB Type-A ports from the rear IO and replaced them with ten Type-C ports — two of which are Thunderbolt enabled. This is perfect for all the latest peripherals that use a USB Type-C connector. There's also room for three M.2 slots, three of which are PCIe Gen 5 and one Gen 4.Sandisk's WDBlack SN850X is a stunning PCIe Gen 4 SSD that uses a proprietary controller and 112-Layer BiCS5 TLC flash memory to achieve read and write speeds of 7,300MB/s and 6,300MB/s, respectively, with random read/write IOPS of 1,100K. With 2TB of capacity, this speedy drive is perfect to host both your operating system, games, and applications.Corsair's Frame 4500X RS-R white mid-tower PC case offers a panoramic view of the internals of your precious PC. If you use it to build this bundle, you'll be able to show off the matching white components inside. Supports rear connecting motherboards and uses Corsair's InfiniRail system for installing different-sized cooling fans.Finally, the combo comes with a free gift of a 360mm ASRock Pro all-in-one white liquid CPU cooler. All you need to add to turn this bundle into a complete PC is a graphics card and an appropriate power supply. items.author: Stewart Bendle
items.titleZh: 最新英特尔酷睿Ultra 7 270K套装含2TB固态硬盘与64GB内存，仅售1499美元——包含Z890主板、机箱及一体式水冷散热器，添置显卡与电源即可组建完整PC。
items.descriptionZh:
Newegg平台近期推出了一款极具性价比的PC组装套装，核心是英特尔最新发布的Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 24核心处理器。该套装几乎囊括了构建一台高性能白色主题游戏或生产力PC所需的所有关键部件，售价仅为1499.99美元，相较2635.95美元的组件零售总价，直降1135.96美元，折扣幅度高达43%。用户仅需额外配备显卡和电源即可完成整机搭建。

**核心组件与技术细节**

1.  **处理器：英特尔 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus**
    作为套装的核心，这款处理器在游戏性能上与英特尔旗舰产品Core i9-14900K持平，在生产力和多线程工作负载中则可与AMD的Ryzen 9 9950X相媲美，但价格更具优势。基准测试显示，其在单线程和多线程应用场景中表现尤为出色，提供了极高的性价比。

2.  **主板：华擎 ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua**
    这款旗舰级主板设计激进，后置I/O面板完全取消了传统的USB Type-A接口，取而代之的是10个USB Type-C接口，其中两个支持Thunderbolt协议。这完美契合了当前以Type-C接口为主流的外设趋势。主板还提供了4个M.2插槽，其中3个支持PCIe Gen 5，1个支持PCIe Gen 4，为高速存储提供了充裕的扩展空间。

3.  **内存：海盗船复仇者RGB DDR5-6400 64GB**
    套装包含64GB大容量DDR5内存，频率为6400 MT/s，时序为CL32（40-40-84）。值得注意的是，由于AI数据中心需求激增冲击内存供应链，此类高性能内存的零售价格目前处于高位（列表显示约1175.99美元），而通过此套装购买能显著降低成本。

4.  **固态硬盘：西部数据WD Black SN850X 2TB**
    这是一款高性能PCIe Gen 4 SSD，采用专有控制器和112层BiCS5 TLC闪存，标称顺序读取速度高达7,300 MB/s，写入速度达6,300 MB/s，随机读写IOPS可达1,100K。2TB的容量足以同时容纳操作系统、大型游戏和应用程序。

5.  **机箱与散热：海盗船4500X RS-R中塔机箱 & 华擎AIO Pro White 360水冷**
    机箱采用白色设计，提供全景侧透，可完美展示内部统一的白色组件。它支持背插主板，并采用海盗船的InfiniRail系统，便于安装不同尺寸的散热风扇。套装还免费赠送了华擎的360mm白色一体式水冷散热器，确保了处理器在高负载下的稳定运行。

**价格分析与市场背景**

该套装最大的吸引力在于其惊人的折扣力度。除了处理器本身的性价比外，它将目前市场上因“AI数据中心需求挤压”而价格高企的内存和SSD等组件以打包形式大幅降价出售。例如，套装内内存和SSD的组合价值被估算为约602美元，远低于其当前夸张的零售标价。这种捆绑销售是消费者以合理价格获取高端存储部件的有效途径。

**应用场景与影响**

此套装针对的是追求高性能和个性化外观的PC构建者，特别是白色主题（“全家桶”）爱好者。它非常适合用于：
*   **高端游戏PC**：强大的多核处理器和高速内存、存储能为游戏提供卓越的平台性能。
*   **内容创作与生产力工作站**：24核心的处理器、大容量高速内存和SSD，能够流畅处理视频编辑、3D渲染、软件开发等重度多线程任务。
*   **展示型PC搭建**：统一的白色美学设计加上全景机箱，使其也适合作为展示用的高性能桌面艺术品。

总的来说，Newegg的这款套装不仅通过大幅降价降低了高端PC的入门门槛，更通过精选搭配的、在设计上具有前瞻性（如全Type-C接口主板）的组件，为用户提供了一个兼具顶尖性能、未来兼容性和视觉美感的出色解决方案。对于希望在近期组建高性能白色主题主机的用户而言，这是一个非常值得考虑的一站式选择。

items.title: NVIDIA and Partners Showcase the Future of AI-Driven Manufacturing at Hannover Messe 2026
items.description: Manufacturing is at an inflection point. Across every major industrial economy, the pressure to do more with less — due to faster design cycles, leaner operations and strain on skilled labor pools — is accelerating the shift to AI-driven production.  The question is no longer whether to adopt AI, but how fast and at what […]
items.content: Manufacturing is at an inflection point. Across every major industrial economy, the pressure to do more with less — due to faster design cycles, leaner operations and strain on skilled labor pools — is accelerating the shift to AI-driven production. The question is no longer whether to adopt AI, but how fast and at what scale. At Hannover Messe 2026, running April 20-24 in Hannover, Germany, NVIDIA and its partners are demonstrating AI-driven manufacturing in action. Attendees will experience how advancements in accelerated computing, AI physics, agents and robotics are powering industrial innovation — from agentic design and engineering to real-time simulation, vision AI agents and humanoid robots operating in factories. The factory of the future isn’t just a concept. It’s being built now. AI Infrastructure: Powering Europe’s Next Industrial Era Running AI at scale across the factories and supply chains that manufacturing output relies on requires the right underlying infrastructure. As AI becomes foundational to how products, processes and facilities are designed, built and optimized, manufacturers need a unified, sovereign foundation that’s secure, scalable and built for industrial scale. The Industrial AI Cloud, one of Europe’s largest AI factories built in Germany by Deutsche Telekom on NVIDIA AI infrastructure, is a blueprint for the future. It provides a secure, sovereign foundation for accelerating AI and robotics across Europe’s industries. At the show, industry leaders, including Agile Robots, SAP, Siemens, PhysicsX and Wandelbots, will share how they are using this sovereign AI platform to run AI-accelerated workloads ranging from AI physics-driven, real-time simulation to factory-scale digital twins and software-defined robotics. EDAG, a leading independent engineering service provider, also announced it will be running its industrial metaverse platform, metys, on the Industrial AI Cloud — bringing sovereign AI infrastructure to automotive and industrial engineering at scale. To support the increasing demand for AI infrastructure, Dell Technologies, IBM, Lenovo and PNY are also showcasing NVIDIA-accelerated systems, from the edge to data centers, enabling manufacturers to run faster simulations and develop and deploy computer vision, AI agents and robotics in production at scale. AI-Driven Engineering As industrial systems grow more complex, the software that engineers rely on to design, simulate and test them is being transformed with AI physics and agentic AI to keep pace. At Hannover Messe, NVIDIA partners are showcasing how AI-accelerated design and simulation is unlocking new possibilities. Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, Siemens and Synopsys are integrating NVIDIA CUDA-X, AI physics and NVIDIA Omniverse libraries, as well as NVIDIA Nemotron open models, across their software — enabling real-time, physics-grounded simulation, AI-powered design exploration and agentic workflows that empower engineers. Real-Time Factory Simulation Factory-scale digital twins are critical for unlocking process simulation, real-time operations, and the testing and orchestration of robot fleets. At Hannover Messe, partners across manufacturing, energy and automotive are showing how digital twins, built on Omniverse libraries and OpenUSD, enable their customers to design, stress-test and continuously optimize their operations. ABB will showcase how the integration of NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and Microsoft Azure cloud services into its ABB Genix Industrial IoT and AI Suite enables operations teams to understand asset performance in full context and engage AI agents to accelerate root-cause analysis. Dassault Systèmes will demonstrate how AI-driven factories of the future are powered by virtual twin experiences. Attendees will see how these virtual twins harness NVIDIA physical AI libraries to enable autonomous, software-defined production and smarter, agile manufacturing systems. Kongsberg Digital will highlight how integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries into its Kognitwin platform delivers spatial intelligence across critical energy infrastructure. The combination of digital twin models, live operational data and AI agents enables its customers to analyze complex assets, test scenarios virtually and optimize performance before changes reach the physical world. Microsoft is demonstrating how NVIDIA Omniverse libraries integrated with Microsoft Fabric Real-Time Intelligence and IQ enable physically accurate, real-time simulations for organizations to design, simulate and optimize physical systems, while the Azure Physical AI Toolchain — built on the NVIDIA Physical AI Data Factory Blueprint — accelerates the deployment of physical AI and autonomous robots into production. Siemens will highlight how integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries into its Digital Twin Composer solution turns multi-domain engineering and operational data into a comprehensive, simulation-ready digital twin — helping its customers deliver throughput gains and identify production issues before physical changes. By combining the Wandelbots NOVA Platform with Omniverse libraries such as NVIDIA Omniverse NuRec, Wandelbots highlights a powerful pathway to digitalize real-world facilities into physically accurate simulations. For solutions like Gessmann’s GESSbot robots, this opens up future opportunities to accelerate commissioning and reduce deployment risks across complex industrial sites. Bringing AI Agents to the Factory Floor Traditional AI answers problems under a rigid set of conditions. AI agents bring a new level of proactive and adaptive intelligence that provides the context on what’s seen and analyzes what’s happening before taking action. At the show, attendees will see how vision AI agents built on NVIDIA Metropolis libraries along with Nemotron and NVIDIA Cosmos open models are transforming industrial operations, combining multiple data streams with existing camera infrastructure to reach new levels of quality control, operational efficiency and worker safety. Invisible AI is launching its Vision Execution System, a vision AI system that uses agents to capture, structure and analyze every production cycle on the factory floor in real time. Built with the NVIDIA Metropolis VSS Blueprint and NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2 and Nemotron models, these autonomous AI agents surface actionable insights directly to operators before issues compound. This class of production intelligence is already driving measurable gains at some of the world’s largest automotive manufacturing factories like Toyota. Tulip Interfaces will showcase Factory Playback, which uses the VSS blueprint and Cosmos Reason 2 to synchronize machine telemetry, operator workflows, quality events and video into a searchable, contextualized timeline of operations. Terex, a global industrial equipment manufacturer with over 40 plants, uses the platform to gain valuable insights and is expected to achieve an estimated 3% increase in yield and 10% reduction in rework. Fogsphere extends vision AI into some of the most demanding manufacturing and industrial environments. Its Vision Agent platform — now supporting ARM-based edge deployment and training workflows built on NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2 and the Metropolis VSS Blueprint — enables its customers to build and finetune visual AI agents. Saipem, an engineering services company in the energy and industrial ecosystem, is using the platform to build agents that can detect and respond in real time to high-risk safety and environmental events. Machines That Can Think AI reasoning is breaking industrial robots free from single-task constraints and time-consuming reprogramming, giving them the ability to navigate unstructured environments, learn new tasks and act autonomously. At Hannover Messe, NVIDIA partners are demonstrating robots completing real production tasks and physical AI frameworks that put autonomous automation within reach of manufacturers of every size. At a Siemens blueprint autonomous electronics factory in Erlangen, Germany, Humanoid’s HMND 01 wheeled humanoid — running the NVIDIA Jetson Thor edge AI module for on-robot compute and developed using Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab open frameworks for simulation and reinforcement learning — has completed autonomous logistics operations in a first proof of concept within the production environment. Humanoid’s simulation-first development compressed what typically takes up to two years of hardware development down to just seven months. SCHUNK’s GROW automation cell brings physical AI into production in a standardized, deployable form. NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and Isaac simulation frameworks enable robot behavior to be simulated, trained and validated before the cell goes live. Wandelbots’ NOVA platform connects simulation to the shop floor for continuous refinement, while EY designs the operating model to scale it across Europe’s small- and medium-sized enterprises. Using NVIDIA’s physical AI stack, including the Physical AI Data Factory Blueprint and NVIDIA IGX Thor for industrial-grade edge compute with functional safety, Hexagon Robotics is accelerating robot training, validation and deployment. The results are already taking shape, with AEON set to perform assembly operations at a BMW Plant in Leipzig — marking one of the first humanoid deployments in a German production environment. QNX has expanded its collaboration with NVIDIA to power safety‑critical edge AI systems for robotics, medical and industrial applications, with QNX OS for Safety 8.0 now integrated on NVIDIA IGX Thor and the NVIDIA Halos safety stack. Explore NVIDIA AI technologies for industrial and manufacturing by joining NVIDIA at Hannover Messe.
items.author: James McKenna
items.titleZh: 2026年汉诺威工业博览会：NVIDIA与合作伙伴展示AI驱动制造业未来
items.descriptionZh:
制造业正处在一个关键转折点。全球各主要工业经济体都面临着“以更少资源实现更多产出”的巨大压力，这源于日益加快的设计周期、精益化运营以及对熟练劳动力日益增长的需求。这一压力正加速制造业向人工智能驱动的生产模式转型。如今的问题已不再是“是否采用AI”，而是“以多快的速度、在多大规模上部署”。

在2026年4月20日至24日于德国汉诺威举行的汉诺威工业博览会上，NVIDIA及其合作伙伴正在现场展示AI驱动制造业的实际应用。参观者将亲身体验加速计算、AI物理仿真、智能体（Agent）和机器人领域的技术进步如何推动工业创新——涵盖从智能体驱动的设计与工程，到实时仿真、视觉AI智能体以及在工厂中运行的人形机器人。未来的工厂已不再是一个概念，它正在被构建。

**AI基础设施：驱动欧洲下一个工业时代**
要在支撑制造业产出的工厂和供应链中大规模运行AI，需要正确的基础设施支撑。随着AI成为产品、流程和设施设计、建造与优化的基础，制造商需要一个安全、可扩展且为工业规模构建的统一、主权化基础。
由德国电信基于NVIDIA AI基础设施在德国建造的“工业AI云”，作为欧洲最大的AI工厂之一，为未来提供了蓝图。它为加速欧洲各行业AI和机器人技术的应用提供了一个安全、主权化的基础。展会上，包括Agile Robots、SAP、西门子、PhysicsX和Wandelbots在内的行业领袖将分享他们如何利用这一主权AI平台运行AI加速的工作负载，范围从AI物理驱动的实时仿真到工厂级的数字孪生和软件定义机器人。
领先的独立工程服务提供商EDAG也宣布，将在工业AI云上运行其工业元宇宙平台metys，从而将主权AI基础设施大规模引入汽车和工业工程领域。
为满足对AI基础设施日益增长的需求，戴尔科技、IBM、联想和PNY也展示了从边缘到数据中心的NVIDIA加速系统，使制造商能够运行更快的仿真，并在生产环境中大规模开发、部署计算机视觉、AI智能体和机器人技术。

**AI驱动的工程**
随着工业系统日趋复杂，工程师用于设计、仿真和测试它们的软件也正在被AI物理仿真和智能体AI改造，以跟上发展步伐。在汉诺威工博会上，NVIDIA合作伙伴展示了AI加速的设计与仿真如何开启新的可能性。
Cadence、达索系统、西门子和新思科技正在其软件中集成NVIDIA CUDA-X、AI物理和NVIDIA Omniverse库，以及NVIDIA Nemotron开放模型，从而实现实时、基于物理原理的仿真、AI驱动的设计探索和赋予工程师能力的智能体工作流。

**实时工厂仿真**
工厂级的数字孪生对于实现流程仿真、实时运营以及机器人车队的测试与编排至关重要。在汉诺威工博会上，来自制造、能源和汽车领域的合作伙伴展示了基于Omniverse库和OpenUSD构建的数字孪生如何帮助其客户设计、压力测试并持续优化运营。
ABB将展示如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库和Microsoft Azure云服务集成到其ABB Genix工业物联网与AI套件中，使运营团队能够全面了解资产性能，并利用AI智能体加速根本原因分析。
达索系统将演示未来的AI驱动工厂如何由虚拟孪生体验提供动力。参观者将看到这些虚拟孪生如何利用NVIDIA物理AI库实现自主、软件定义的生产以及更智能、更灵活的制造系统。
Kongsberg Digital将重点介绍如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库集成到其Kognitwin平台中，为关键能源基础设施提供空间智能。数字孪生模型、实时运营数据和AI智能体的结合，使其客户能够分析复杂资产、虚拟测试场景，并在变更实施到物理世界之前优化性能。
微软正在演示与Microsoft Fabric实时智能和IQ集成的NVIDIA Omniverse库如何为组织提供物理精确的实时仿真，以设计、模拟和优化物理系统；同时，基于NVIDIA物理AI数据工厂蓝图构建的Azure物理AI工具链，加速了物理AI和自主机器人在生产环境中的部署。
西门子将重点介绍如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库集成到其数字孪生编辑器解决方案中，将多领域工程和运营数据转化为全面、可用于仿真的数字孪生，帮助客户提升吞吐量并在物理变更前识别生产问题。
通过将Wandelbots NOVA平台与NVIDIA Omniverse NuRec等Omniverse库相结合，Wandelbots展示了一条将真实设施数字化为物理精确仿真的强大途径。对于像Gessmann的GESSbot机器人这样的解决方案，这为在复杂工业现场加速调试和降低部署风险开辟了未来机遇。

**将AI智能体引入工厂车间**
传统AI在僵化的条件下解决问题。AI智能体则带来了一种全新水平的主动和自适应智能，它能在采取行动前理解所见的背景并分析正在发生的情况。
在展会上，参观者将看到基于NVIDIA Metropolis库以及Nemotron和NVIDIA Cosmos开放模型构建的视觉AI智能体如何变革工业运营，它们将多个数据流与现有摄像头基础设施结合，实现质量控制、运营效率和工人安全的新高度。
Invisible AI推出了其视觉执行系统，这是一个利用智能体实时捕获、构建和分析工厂车间每个生产周期的视觉AI系统。该系统基于NVIDIA Metropolis VSS蓝图、NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2和Nemotron模型构建，这些自主AI智能体能在问题累积之前，直接将可执行的洞察呈现给操作员。这类生产智能已在丰田等全球最大汽车制造工厂中带来了可量化的收益。
Tulip Interfaces将展示“工厂回放”功能，它使用VSS蓝图和Cosmos Reason 2将机器遥测数据、操作员工作流程、质量事件和视频同步到一个可搜索、情境化的运营时间轴中。拥有40多家工厂的全球工业设备制造商特雷克斯使用该平台获得了宝贵的洞察，预计可实现约3%的产量提升和10%的返工减少。
Fogsphere将视觉AI扩展到一些要求最苛刻的制造和工业环境中。其Vision Agent平台现已支持基于ARM的边缘部署以及基于NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2和Metropolis VSS蓝图构建的训练工作流，使客户能够构建和微调视觉AI智能体。能源和工业生态系统中的工程服务公司Saipem正在使用该平台构建能够实时检测并响应高风险安全和环境事件的智能体。

**会思考的机器**
AI推理能力正在将工业机器人从单一任务的限制和耗时的重新编程中解放出来，赋予它们在非结构化环境中导航、学习新任务和自主行动的能力。在汉诺威工博会上，NVIDIA合作伙伴展示了机器人完成真实生产任务的能力，以及使各种规模的制造商都能触及自主自动化的物理AI框架。
在德国埃尔兰根的一个西门子自主电子工厂蓝图中，Humanoid公司的HMND 01轮式人形机器人——搭载用于机器人本体计算的NVIDIA Jetson Thor边缘AI模块，并使用Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab开放框架进行仿真和强化学习开发——已在生产环境中完成了自主物流操作的首次概念验证。Humanoid采用的仿真优先开发方法，将通常长达两年的硬件开发周期压缩到了仅七个月。
SCHUNK的GROW自动化单元以标准化、可部署的形式将物理AI引入生产。NVIDIA Omniverse库和Isaac仿真框架使机器人行为在单元投入使用前即可被模拟、训练和验证。Wandelbots的NOVA平台将仿真与车间现场连接起来，实现持续优化，而EY则设计了将其规模化推广至欧洲中小企业的运营模式。
利用NVIDIA的物理AI技术栈，包括物理AI数据工厂蓝图和用于具备功能安全的工业级边缘计算的NVIDIA IGX Thor，Hexagon Robotics正在加速机器人的训练、验证和部署。成果已初具雏形，AEON人形机器人将在莱比锡的宝马工厂执行装配操作，这标志着德国生产环境中首批人形机器人的部署之一。
QNX扩大了与NVIDIA的合作，为机器人、医疗和工业应用的安全关键边缘AI系统提供动力，其QNX OS for Safety 8.0现已集成在NVIDIA IGX Thor和NVIDIA Halos安全栈上。

如需探索NVIDIA面向工业和制造业的AI技术，请莅临汉诺威工博会NVIDIA展台。

history.title: Autonomous AI at Scale: Adobe Agents Unlock Breakthrough Creative Intelligence With NVIDIA and WPP
history.description: AI agents are transforming how work gets done across all industries, accelerating everything from content creation to decision-making. NVIDIA’s expanded strategic collaborations with Adobe and WPP are bringing agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations across creative production and customer experience orchestration.  As demand for personalized customer experiences surges, brands require intelligent systems […]
history.content: AI agents are transforming how work gets done across all industries, accelerating everything from content creation to decision-making. NVIDIA’s expanded strategic collaborations with Adobe and WPP are bringing agentic AI to the center of enterprise marketing operations across creative production and customer experience orchestration. As demand for personalized customer experiences surges, brands require intelligent systems that can plan, create, produce and activate content continuously — without compromising control, governance or brand integrity. Consider a global retailer delivering the right offer, image, copy and price, across millions of product, audience and channel combinations — updated in minutes instead of months. For marketing and creative teams, that means moving from one-size-fits-all campaigns to tailored experiences that are always on, always relevant and on brand. All of it is powered by intelligent systems that continuously generate and deliver content without sacrificing control, governance or brand integrity. The expanded collaborations bring together three complementary strengths: Adobe’s creative and customer experience platforms and the new Adobe CX Enterprise Coworker, WPP’s global media and marketing expertise, and NVIDIA’s accelerated computing and software stack, including NVIDIA Nemotron open models, NVIDIA Agent Toolkit and the NVIDIA OpenShell secure runtime for building and running secure agentic AI systems. As these agents begin orchestrating multistep workflows, tapping sensitive data and triggering actions across marketing stacks, enterprises need a way to enforce clear rules of engagement so every operation remains compliant, on brand and within defined risk boundaries. Powered by the NVIDIA OpenShell runtime, every agent operates within a secure, isolated environment, delivering enterprise-grade control, consistency and auditability across the entire marketing lifecycle, with verifiable policy management, answering the question, “What can the agent do?” and not just, “What policy is in place?” In governed environments, enterprises can also keep key workflows and intelligence services inside their trust boundary, including securely invoking Adobe CX Intelligence as part of customer experience agents. A live demo of CX Enterprise Coworker — powered by NVIDIA Agent Toolkit, including the OpenShell runtime and Nemotron models — will be featured during Adobe Summit’s day-two keynote taking place Tuesday, April 21, at 9 a.m. PT. The collaboration enables: End-to-end agentic workflows: Adobe is developing creative and marketing agents that can generate, adapt and version on-brand assets. Adobe’s CX Enterprise Coworker orchestrates downstream customer experience workflows from personalization to activation, closing the loop between content creation and customer engagement. Controlled execution with NVIDIA OpenShell: Agents run in a policy-based, containerized sandbox designed to keep execution governed, observable and auditable, helping enterprises safely deploy long-running agentic workflows on premises or in the cloud. Commercially safe content at scale: Adobe Firefly Foundry, accelerated by NVIDIA AI infrastructure, can help organizations deeply tune custom models on their proprietary assets, enabling agents to generate commercially safe content at scale and aligned to brand identity. A 3D digital twins solution for scalable marketing production: Adobe’s cloud-native 3D digital twin solution is now generally available, built on NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and OpenUSD. 3D digital twins serve as persistent product identities that agents use to automate and scale high-fidelity content creation across formats, markets and configurations. Creative Intelligence Meets Performance Intelligence With Policy-Governed Agents Governed environments such as the ones enabled by this collaboration act as a set of “guardrails” that keep AI operations observable and auditable, preventing the system from acting outside of a company’s specific data boundaries or brand rules. By combining Adobe’s creative platforms, WPP’s media and marketing expertise and NVIDIA’s secure infrastructure with CX Enterprise Coworker, brands no longer have to choose between speed and safety. Autonomous agents can now generate, adapt and activate content at scale while operating within governed, policy-driven environments. The result is a new foundation for agentic marketing — where creative intelligence, performance and trust are built in from the start and delivered at global scale. Watch NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang’s Adobe Summit fireside chat with Adobe CEO Shantanu Narayen, taking place today at 2:20 p.m. PT.
history.author: Richard Kerris
history.titleZh: 大规模自主AI：Adobe助手携手NVIDIA与WPP开启突破性创意智能
history.descriptionZh:
随着人工智能代理技术逐渐渗透各行各业，从内容创作到决策制定的工作流程正在经历根本性变革。在这一趋势下，英伟达近期深化了与Adobe和WPP的战略合作，旨在将智能代理AI置于企业营销运营的核心，覆盖创意生产与客户体验编排的全过程。

当前，市场对个性化客户体验的需求激增，品牌方亟需能够持续规划、创作、制作并激活内容的智能系统，同时确保不牺牲管控力、治理标准或品牌一致性。例如，一家全球零售商需要在数百万种产品、受众和渠道组合中精准推送匹配的优惠、图像、文案和价格，并将更新周期从数月缩短至几分钟。对营销和创意团队而言，这意味着从“一刀切”的营销活动转向持续在线、高度相关且符合品牌调性的个性化体验。这一切都依赖于能够在保持控制力与品牌完整性的前提下，持续生成和交付内容的智能系统。

此次扩大的合作汇聚了三方的互补优势：Adobe的创意与客户体验平台及其新推出的CX Enterprise Coworker、WPP的全球媒体与营销专业知识，以及英伟达的加速计算与软件堆栈。英伟达的软件堆栈包括Nemotron开源模型、Agent Toolkit，以及用于构建和运行安全智能代理系统的OpenShell安全运行时环境。

随着这些代理开始编排多步骤工作流、调用敏感数据并在营销技术栈中触发操作，企业需要一种方法来执行明确的交互规则，以确保每项操作都合规、符合品牌规范且处于既定风险边界内。借助英伟达OpenShell运行时的支持，每个代理都在一个安全、隔离的环境中运行，为整个营销生命周期提供企业级的控制力、一致性和可审计性。它实现了可验证的策略管理，不仅回答“当前策略是什么”，更关键的是能明确界定“代理能做什么”。在受治理的环境中，企业还可将关键工作流和智能服务保留在其信任边界内，包括安全地调用Adobe CX Intelligence作为客户体验代理的一部分。

在4月21日太平洋时间上午9点举行的Adobe Summit第二天主题演讲中，将展示一个由英伟达Agent Toolkit（包含OpenShell运行时和Nemotron模型）驱动的CX Enterprise Coworker实时演示。此次合作主要实现了以下能力：

端到端的智能代理工作流：Adobe正在开发能够生成、调整和版本化品牌资产的创意与营销代理。其CX Enterprise Coworker可编排从个性化到激活的下游客户体验工作流，从而闭合内容创作与客户互动之间的循环。

基于NVIDIA OpenShell的受控执行：代理运行于一个基于策略的容器化沙箱环境中，旨在确保执行过程受治理、可观察且可审计，帮助企业安全地在本地或云端部署长期运行的智能代理工作流。

规模化生成商业安全内容：由英伟达AI基础设施加速的Adobe Firefly Foundry，可帮助组织基于其专有资产深度调优定制模型，使代理能够大规模生成符合商业安全要求且与品牌形象一致的内容。

面向规模化营销生产的3D数字孪生解决方案：Adobe基于英伟达Omniverse库和OpenUSD构建的云原生3D数字孪生解决方案现已全面上市。3D数字孪生作为持久的产品标识，可供代理用于跨格式、市场和配置自动化并规模化生成高保真内容。

**创意智能与性能智能在策略治理代理中的融合**

通过此次合作实现的受治理环境，如同一套“护栏”，能够保持AI操作的可观察性和可审计性，防止系统在企业的特定数据边界或品牌规则之外行动。通过将Adobe的创意平台、WPP的媒体营销专长、英伟达的安全基础设施与CX Enterprise Coworker相结合，品牌方不再需要在速度与安全之间做出取舍。自主代理如今可以在受治理、策略驱动的环境中规模化地生成、调整和激活内容。

这为智能代理营销奠定了新的基础——创意智能、性能与信任从一开始就被内置其中，并能在全球范围内交付。英伟达创始人兼首席执行官黄仁勋与Adobe首席执行官Shantanu Narayen在Adobe Summit上的炉边谈话已于太平洋时间今日下午2:20举行，进一步深入探讨了此次合作的前景。

history.title: Latest Intel Core Ultra 7 270K bundle includes a 2TB SSD and 64GB of RAM for just $1,499 — includes Z890 motherboard, case, and AIO cooler, just add a GPU and PSU for a complete PC build
history.description: This Newegg Intel combo bundle pairs an Intel 270K Plus, Z890 mobo, 64GB of DDR5 RAM, 2TB SSD, PC Case, and AIO cooler altogether for $1499.99.

Subscribe to our newsletter Newegg has Intel's latest CPU release, the Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 24-core processor, up for grabs in a value bundle that includes almost everything you'd need to build a high-spec gaming or productivity PC. With a full list of components that include the Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus, ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM, a 2TB WD Black SN850X SSD, Corsair Frame 4500X RS-R case, and ASRock AIO Pro White 360 CPU cooler, all for just $1499.99, all you need to complete the build is a graphics card and power supply. Plus, all the visible components are white, so it's possible to make a clean white PC build in one swift go. ● Grab this deal at Newegg You are managing to save a whopping $1135.96 off the $2635.95 list price for these components, which is nothing to sniff at. The Newegg listing for the 64GB of Corsair memory is $1175.99, along with $559.99 for the excellent Gen 4 WD Black SN850X M.2 SSD, both heavily overpriced due to the price surging from the AI-data center crunch affecting the memory supply chain. Combo deals like this are a great way to pick up extra-expensive components like RAM and SSDs at a lower price, with this particular bundle making the RAM and SSD $602 in total. Save 43% ($1,135.96)Newegg Intel Core Ultra 7 270K Plus bundle: was $2,635.95 now $1,499.99 at NeweggThis Newegg bundle has almost everything you need to build an all-white PC, including Intel's latest Core Ultra 7 270K Plus processor, ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM, a 2TB WD Black SN850X SSD, Corsair Frame 4500X RS-R case, and ASRock AIO Pro White 360 CPU cooler.View Deal The Core Ultra 7 270K Plus is at the heart of this bundle deal. It's just as fast as Intel's Core i9-14900K in gaming, and is comparable with AMD's Ryzen 9 9950X in productivity workloads, but at a fraction of the price. As you can see from our benchmark testing chart, the 270K Plus is pretty good in a gaming environment, but exceptional in single-threaded and multi-threaded performance against its competition. Image 1 of 3(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future)(Image credit: Future) The most expensive component in our bundle is, of course, the RAM. It's priced well over a thousand dollars, insane inflation, but a common sight these days. This large 64GB of Corsair Vengeance RGB DDR5-6400 RAM has a CAS latency of CL32 and timings of 40-40-84.The combo also includes ASRock's flagship Z890 Taichi Aqua motherboard, which has interestingly dropped all USB Type-A ports from the rear IO and replaced them with ten Type-C ports — two of which are Thunderbolt enabled. This is perfect for all the latest peripherals that use a USB Type-C connector. There's also room for three M.2 slots, three of which are PCIe Gen 5 and one Gen 4.Sandisk's WDBlack SN850X is a stunning PCIe Gen 4 SSD that uses a proprietary controller and 112-Layer BiCS5 TLC flash memory to achieve read and write speeds of 7,300MB/s and 6,300MB/s, respectively, with random read/write IOPS of 1,100K. With 2TB of capacity, this speedy drive is perfect to host both your operating system, games, and applications.Corsair's Frame 4500X RS-R white mid-tower PC case offers a panoramic view of the internals of your precious PC. If you use it to build this bundle, you'll be able to show off the matching white components inside. Supports rear connecting motherboards and uses Corsair's InfiniRail system for installing different-sized cooling fans.Finally, the combo comes with a free gift of a 360mm ASRock Pro all-in-one white liquid CPU cooler. All you need to add to turn this bundle into a complete PC is a graphics card and an appropriate power supply. history.author: Stewart Bendle
history.titleZh: 最新英特尔酷睿Ultra 7 270K套装含2TB固态硬盘与64GB内存，仅售1499美元——包含Z890主板、机箱及一体式水冷散热器，添置显卡与电源即可组建完整PC。
history.descriptionZh:
Newegg平台近期推出了一款极具性价比的PC组装套装，核心是英特尔最新发布的Core Ultra 7 270K Plus 24核心处理器。该套装几乎囊括了构建一台高性能白色主题游戏或生产力PC所需的所有关键部件，售价仅为1499.99美元，相较2635.95美元的组件零售总价，直降1135.96美元，折扣幅度高达43%。用户仅需额外配备显卡和电源即可完成整机搭建。

**核心组件与技术细节**

1.  **处理器：英特尔 Core Ultra 7 270K Plus**
    作为套装的核心，这款处理器在游戏性能上与英特尔旗舰产品Core i9-14900K持平，在生产力和多线程工作负载中则可与AMD的Ryzen 9 9950X相媲美，但价格更具优势。基准测试显示，其在单线程和多线程应用场景中表现尤为出色，提供了极高的性价比。

2.  **主板：华擎 ASRock Z890 Taichi Aqua**
    这款旗舰级主板设计激进，后置I/O面板完全取消了传统的USB Type-A接口，取而代之的是10个USB Type-C接口，其中两个支持Thunderbolt协议。这完美契合了当前以Type-C接口为主流的外设趋势。主板还提供了4个M.2插槽，其中3个支持PCIe Gen 5，1个支持PCIe Gen 4，为高速存储提供了充裕的扩展空间。

3.  **内存：海盗船复仇者RGB DDR5-6400 64GB**
    套装包含64GB大容量DDR5内存，频率为6400 MT/s，时序为CL32（40-40-84）。值得注意的是，由于AI数据中心需求激增冲击内存供应链，此类高性能内存的零售价格目前处于高位（列表显示约1175.99美元），而通过此套装购买能显著降低成本。

4.  **固态硬盘：西部数据WD Black SN850X 2TB**
    这是一款高性能PCIe Gen 4 SSD，采用专有控制器和112层BiCS5 TLC闪存，标称顺序读取速度高达7,300 MB/s，写入速度达6,300 MB/s，随机读写IOPS可达1,100K。2TB的容量足以同时容纳操作系统、大型游戏和应用程序。

5.  **机箱与散热：海盗船4500X RS-R中塔机箱 & 华擎AIO Pro White 360水冷**
    机箱采用白色设计，提供全景侧透，可完美展示内部统一的白色组件。它支持背插主板，并采用海盗船的InfiniRail系统，便于安装不同尺寸的散热风扇。套装还免费赠送了华擎的360mm白色一体式水冷散热器，确保了处理器在高负载下的稳定运行。

**价格分析与市场背景**

该套装最大的吸引力在于其惊人的折扣力度。除了处理器本身的性价比外，它将目前市场上因“AI数据中心需求挤压”而价格高企的内存和SSD等组件以打包形式大幅降价出售。例如，套装内内存和SSD的组合价值被估算为约602美元，远低于其当前夸张的零售标价。这种捆绑销售是消费者以合理价格获取高端存储部件的有效途径。

**应用场景与影响**

此套装针对的是追求高性能和个性化外观的PC构建者，特别是白色主题（“全家桶”）爱好者。它非常适合用于：
*   **高端游戏PC**：强大的多核处理器和高速内存、存储能为游戏提供卓越的平台性能。
*   **内容创作与生产力工作站**：24核心的处理器、大容量高速内存和SSD，能够流畅处理视频编辑、3D渲染、软件开发等重度多线程任务。
*   **展示型PC搭建**：统一的白色美学设计加上全景机箱，使其也适合作为展示用的高性能桌面艺术品。

总的来说，Newegg的这款套装不仅通过大幅降价降低了高端PC的入门门槛，更通过精选搭配的、在设计上具有前瞻性（如全Type-C接口主板）的组件，为用户提供了一个兼具顶尖性能、未来兼容性和视觉美感的出色解决方案。对于希望在近期组建高性能白色主题主机的用户而言，这是一个非常值得考虑的一站式选择。

history.title: NVIDIA and Partners Showcase the Future of AI-Driven Manufacturing at Hannover Messe 2026
history.description: Manufacturing is at an inflection point. Across every major industrial economy, the pressure to do more with less — due to faster design cycles, leaner operations and strain on skilled labor pools — is accelerating the shift to AI-driven production.  The question is no longer whether to adopt AI, but how fast and at what […]
history.content: Manufacturing is at an inflection point. Across every major industrial economy, the pressure to do more with less — due to faster design cycles, leaner operations and strain on skilled labor pools — is accelerating the shift to AI-driven production. The question is no longer whether to adopt AI, but how fast and at what scale. At Hannover Messe 2026, running April 20-24 in Hannover, Germany, NVIDIA and its partners are demonstrating AI-driven manufacturing in action. Attendees will experience how advancements in accelerated computing, AI physics, agents and robotics are powering industrial innovation — from agentic design and engineering to real-time simulation, vision AI agents and humanoid robots operating in factories. The factory of the future isn’t just a concept. It’s being built now. AI Infrastructure: Powering Europe’s Next Industrial Era Running AI at scale across the factories and supply chains that manufacturing output relies on requires the right underlying infrastructure. As AI becomes foundational to how products, processes and facilities are designed, built and optimized, manufacturers need a unified, sovereign foundation that’s secure, scalable and built for industrial scale. The Industrial AI Cloud, one of Europe’s largest AI factories built in Germany by Deutsche Telekom on NVIDIA AI infrastructure, is a blueprint for the future. It provides a secure, sovereign foundation for accelerating AI and robotics across Europe’s industries. At the show, industry leaders, including Agile Robots, SAP, Siemens, PhysicsX and Wandelbots, will share how they are using this sovereign AI platform to run AI-accelerated workloads ranging from AI physics-driven, real-time simulation to factory-scale digital twins and software-defined robotics. EDAG, a leading independent engineering service provider, also announced it will be running its industrial metaverse platform, metys, on the Industrial AI Cloud — bringing sovereign AI infrastructure to automotive and industrial engineering at scale. To support the increasing demand for AI infrastructure, Dell Technologies, IBM, Lenovo and PNY are also showcasing NVIDIA-accelerated systems, from the edge to data centers, enabling manufacturers to run faster simulations and develop and deploy computer vision, AI agents and robotics in production at scale. AI-Driven Engineering As industrial systems grow more complex, the software that engineers rely on to design, simulate and test them is being transformed with AI physics and agentic AI to keep pace. At Hannover Messe, NVIDIA partners are showcasing how AI-accelerated design and simulation is unlocking new possibilities. Cadence, Dassault Systèmes, Siemens and Synopsys are integrating NVIDIA CUDA-X, AI physics and NVIDIA Omniverse libraries, as well as NVIDIA Nemotron open models, across their software — enabling real-time, physics-grounded simulation, AI-powered design exploration and agentic workflows that empower engineers. Real-Time Factory Simulation Factory-scale digital twins are critical for unlocking process simulation, real-time operations, and the testing and orchestration of robot fleets. At Hannover Messe, partners across manufacturing, energy and automotive are showing how digital twins, built on Omniverse libraries and OpenUSD, enable their customers to design, stress-test and continuously optimize their operations. ABB will showcase how the integration of NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and Microsoft Azure cloud services into its ABB Genix Industrial IoT and AI Suite enables operations teams to understand asset performance in full context and engage AI agents to accelerate root-cause analysis. Dassault Systèmes will demonstrate how AI-driven factories of the future are powered by virtual twin experiences. Attendees will see how these virtual twins harness NVIDIA physical AI libraries to enable autonomous, software-defined production and smarter, agile manufacturing systems. Kongsberg Digital will highlight how integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries into its Kognitwin platform delivers spatial intelligence across critical energy infrastructure. The combination of digital twin models, live operational data and AI agents enables its customers to analyze complex assets, test scenarios virtually and optimize performance before changes reach the physical world. Microsoft is demonstrating how NVIDIA Omniverse libraries integrated with Microsoft Fabric Real-Time Intelligence and IQ enable physically accurate, real-time simulations for organizations to design, simulate and optimize physical systems, while the Azure Physical AI Toolchain — built on the NVIDIA Physical AI Data Factory Blueprint — accelerates the deployment of physical AI and autonomous robots into production. Siemens will highlight how integrating NVIDIA Omniverse libraries into its Digital Twin Composer solution turns multi-domain engineering and operational data into a comprehensive, simulation-ready digital twin — helping its customers deliver throughput gains and identify production issues before physical changes. By combining the Wandelbots NOVA Platform with Omniverse libraries such as NVIDIA Omniverse NuRec, Wandelbots highlights a powerful pathway to digitalize real-world facilities into physically accurate simulations. For solutions like Gessmann’s GESSbot robots, this opens up future opportunities to accelerate commissioning and reduce deployment risks across complex industrial sites. Bringing AI Agents to the Factory Floor Traditional AI answers problems under a rigid set of conditions. AI agents bring a new level of proactive and adaptive intelligence that provides the context on what’s seen and analyzes what’s happening before taking action. At the show, attendees will see how vision AI agents built on NVIDIA Metropolis libraries along with Nemotron and NVIDIA Cosmos open models are transforming industrial operations, combining multiple data streams with existing camera infrastructure to reach new levels of quality control, operational efficiency and worker safety. Invisible AI is launching its Vision Execution System, a vision AI system that uses agents to capture, structure and analyze every production cycle on the factory floor in real time. Built with the NVIDIA Metropolis VSS Blueprint and NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2 and Nemotron models, these autonomous AI agents surface actionable insights directly to operators before issues compound. This class of production intelligence is already driving measurable gains at some of the world’s largest automotive manufacturing factories like Toyota. Tulip Interfaces will showcase Factory Playback, which uses the VSS blueprint and Cosmos Reason 2 to synchronize machine telemetry, operator workflows, quality events and video into a searchable, contextualized timeline of operations. Terex, a global industrial equipment manufacturer with over 40 plants, uses the platform to gain valuable insights and is expected to achieve an estimated 3% increase in yield and 10% reduction in rework. Fogsphere extends vision AI into some of the most demanding manufacturing and industrial environments. Its Vision Agent platform — now supporting ARM-based edge deployment and training workflows built on NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2 and the Metropolis VSS Blueprint — enables its customers to build and finetune visual AI agents. Saipem, an engineering services company in the energy and industrial ecosystem, is using the platform to build agents that can detect and respond in real time to high-risk safety and environmental events. Machines That Can Think AI reasoning is breaking industrial robots free from single-task constraints and time-consuming reprogramming, giving them the ability to navigate unstructured environments, learn new tasks and act autonomously. At Hannover Messe, NVIDIA partners are demonstrating robots completing real production tasks and physical AI frameworks that put autonomous automation within reach of manufacturers of every size. At a Siemens blueprint autonomous electronics factory in Erlangen, Germany, Humanoid’s HMND 01 wheeled humanoid — running the NVIDIA Jetson Thor edge AI module for on-robot compute and developed using Isaac Sim and Isaac Lab open frameworks for simulation and reinforcement learning — has completed autonomous logistics operations in a first proof of concept within the production environment. Humanoid’s simulation-first development compressed what typically takes up to two years of hardware development down to just seven months. SCHUNK’s GROW automation cell brings physical AI into production in a standardized, deployable form. NVIDIA Omniverse libraries and Isaac simulation frameworks enable robot behavior to be simulated, trained and validated before the cell goes live. Wandelbots’ NOVA platform connects simulation to the shop floor for continuous refinement, while EY designs the operating model to scale it across Europe’s small- and medium-sized enterprises. Using NVIDIA’s physical AI stack, including the Physical AI Data Factory Blueprint and NVIDIA IGX Thor for industrial-grade edge compute with functional safety, Hexagon Robotics is accelerating robot training, validation and deployment. The results are already taking shape, with AEON set to perform assembly operations at a BMW Plant in Leipzig — marking one of the first humanoid deployments in a German production environment. QNX has expanded its collaboration with NVIDIA to power safety‑critical edge AI systems for robotics, medical and industrial applications, with QNX OS for Safety 8.0 now integrated on NVIDIA IGX Thor and the NVIDIA Halos safety stack. Explore NVIDIA AI technologies for industrial and manufacturing by joining NVIDIA at Hannover Messe.
history.author: James McKenna
history.titleZh: 2026年汉诺威工业博览会：NVIDIA与合作伙伴展示AI驱动制造业未来
history.descriptionZh:
制造业正处在一个关键转折点。全球各主要工业经济体都面临着“以更少资源实现更多产出”的巨大压力，这源于日益加快的设计周期、精益化运营以及对熟练劳动力日益增长的需求。这一压力正加速制造业向人工智能驱动的生产模式转型。如今的问题已不再是“是否采用AI”，而是“以多快的速度、在多大规模上部署”。

在2026年4月20日至24日于德国汉诺威举行的汉诺威工业博览会上，NVIDIA及其合作伙伴正在现场展示AI驱动制造业的实际应用。参观者将亲身体验加速计算、AI物理仿真、智能体（Agent）和机器人领域的技术进步如何推动工业创新——涵盖从智能体驱动的设计与工程，到实时仿真、视觉AI智能体以及在工厂中运行的人形机器人。未来的工厂已不再是一个概念，它正在被构建。

**AI基础设施：驱动欧洲下一个工业时代**
要在支撑制造业产出的工厂和供应链中大规模运行AI，需要正确的基础设施支撑。随着AI成为产品、流程和设施设计、建造与优化的基础，制造商需要一个安全、可扩展且为工业规模构建的统一、主权化基础。
由德国电信基于NVIDIA AI基础设施在德国建造的“工业AI云”，作为欧洲最大的AI工厂之一，为未来提供了蓝图。它为加速欧洲各行业AI和机器人技术的应用提供了一个安全、主权化的基础。展会上，包括Agile Robots、SAP、西门子、PhysicsX和Wandelbots在内的行业领袖将分享他们如何利用这一主权AI平台运行AI加速的工作负载，范围从AI物理驱动的实时仿真到工厂级的数字孪生和软件定义机器人。
领先的独立工程服务提供商EDAG也宣布，将在工业AI云上运行其工业元宇宙平台metys，从而将主权AI基础设施大规模引入汽车和工业工程领域。
为满足对AI基础设施日益增长的需求，戴尔科技、IBM、联想和PNY也展示了从边缘到数据中心的NVIDIA加速系统，使制造商能够运行更快的仿真，并在生产环境中大规模开发、部署计算机视觉、AI智能体和机器人技术。

**AI驱动的工程**
随着工业系统日趋复杂，工程师用于设计、仿真和测试它们的软件也正在被AI物理仿真和智能体AI改造，以跟上发展步伐。在汉诺威工博会上，NVIDIA合作伙伴展示了AI加速的设计与仿真如何开启新的可能性。
Cadence、达索系统、西门子和新思科技正在其软件中集成NVIDIA CUDA-X、AI物理和NVIDIA Omniverse库，以及NVIDIA Nemotron开放模型，从而实现实时、基于物理原理的仿真、AI驱动的设计探索和赋予工程师能力的智能体工作流。

**实时工厂仿真**
工厂级的数字孪生对于实现流程仿真、实时运营以及机器人车队的测试与编排至关重要。在汉诺威工博会上，来自制造、能源和汽车领域的合作伙伴展示了基于Omniverse库和OpenUSD构建的数字孪生如何帮助其客户设计、压力测试并持续优化运营。
ABB将展示如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库和Microsoft Azure云服务集成到其ABB Genix工业物联网与AI套件中，使运营团队能够全面了解资产性能，并利用AI智能体加速根本原因分析。
达索系统将演示未来的AI驱动工厂如何由虚拟孪生体验提供动力。参观者将看到这些虚拟孪生如何利用NVIDIA物理AI库实现自主、软件定义的生产以及更智能、更灵活的制造系统。
Kongsberg Digital将重点介绍如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库集成到其Kognitwin平台中，为关键能源基础设施提供空间智能。数字孪生模型、实时运营数据和AI智能体的结合，使其客户能够分析复杂资产、虚拟测试场景，并在变更实施到物理世界之前优化性能。
微软正在演示与Microsoft Fabric实时智能和IQ集成的NVIDIA Omniverse库如何为组织提供物理精确的实时仿真，以设计、模拟和优化物理系统；同时，基于NVIDIA物理AI数据工厂蓝图构建的Azure物理AI工具链，加速了物理AI和自主机器人在生产环境中的部署。
西门子将重点介绍如何将NVIDIA Omniverse库集成到其数字孪生编辑器解决方案中，将多领域工程和运营数据转化为全面、可用于仿真的数字孪生，帮助客户提升吞吐量并在物理变更前识别生产问题。
通过将Wandelbots NOVA平台与NVIDIA Omniverse NuRec等Omniverse库相结合，Wandelbots展示了一条将真实设施数字化为物理精确仿真的强大途径。对于像Gessmann的GESSbot机器人这样的解决方案，这为在复杂工业现场加速调试和降低部署风险开辟了未来机遇。

**将AI智能体引入工厂车间**
传统AI在僵化的条件下解决问题。AI智能体则带来了一种全新水平的主动和自适应智能，它能在采取行动前理解所见的背景并分析正在发生的情况。
在展会上，参观者将看到基于NVIDIA Metropolis库以及Nemotron和NVIDIA Cosmos开放模型构建的视觉AI智能体如何变革工业运营，它们将多个数据流与现有摄像头基础设施结合，实现质量控制、运营效率和工人安全的新高度。
Invisible AI推出了其视觉执行系统，这是一个利用智能体实时捕获、构建和分析工厂车间每个生产周期的视觉AI系统。该系统基于NVIDIA Metropolis VSS蓝图、NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2和Nemotron模型构建，这些自主AI智能体能在问题累积之前，直接将可执行的洞察呈现给操作员。这类生产智能已在丰田等全球最大汽车制造工厂中带来了可量化的收益。
Tulip Interfaces将展示“工厂回放”功能，它使用VSS蓝图和Cosmos Reason 2将机器遥测数据、操作员工作流程、质量事件和视频同步到一个可搜索、情境化的运营时间轴中。拥有40多家工厂的全球工业设备制造商特雷克斯使用该平台获得了宝贵的洞察，预计可实现约3%的产量提升和10%的返工减少。
Fogsphere将视觉AI扩展到一些要求最苛刻的制造和工业环境中。其Vision Agent平台现已支持基于ARM的边缘部署以及基于NVIDIA Cosmos Reason 2和Metropolis VSS蓝图构建的训练工作流，使客户能够构建和微调视觉AI智能体。能源和工业生态系统中的工程服务公司Saipem正在使用该平台构建能够实时检测并响应高风险安全和环境事件的智能体。

**会思考的机器**
AI推理能力正在将工业机器人从单一任务的限制和耗时的重新编程中解放出来，赋予它们在非结构化环境中导航、学习新任务和自主行动的能力。在汉诺威工博会上，NVIDIA合作伙伴展示了机器人完成真实生产任务的能力，以及使各种规模的制造商都能触及自主自动化的物理AI框架。
在德国埃尔兰根的一个西门子自主电子工厂蓝图中，Humanoid公司的HMND 01轮式人形机器人——搭载用于机器人本体计算的NVIDIA Jetson Thor边缘AI模块，并使用Isaac Sim和Isaac Lab开放框架进行仿真和强化学习开发——已在生产环境中完成了自主物流操作的首次概念验证。Humanoid采用的仿真优先开发方法，将通常长达两年的硬件开发周期压缩到了仅七个月。
SCHUNK的GROW自动化单元以标准化、可部署的形式将物理AI引入生产。NVIDIA Omniverse库和Isaac仿真框架使机器人行为在单元投入使用前即可被模拟、训练和验证。Wandelbots的NOVA平台将仿真与车间现场连接起来，实现持续优化，而EY则设计了将其规模化推广至欧洲中小企业的运营模式。
利用NVIDIA的物理AI技术栈，包括物理AI数据工厂蓝图和用于具备功能安全的工业级边缘计算的NVIDIA IGX Thor，Hexagon Robotics正在加速机器人的训练、验证和部署。成果已初具雏形，AEON人形机器人将在莱比锡的宝马工厂执行装配操作，这标志着德国生产环境中首批人形机器人的部署之一。
QNX扩大了与NVIDIA的合作，为机器人、医疗和工业应用的安全关键边缘AI系统提供动力，其QNX OS for Safety 8.0现已集成在NVIDIA IGX Thor和NVIDIA Halos安全栈上。
